hideText: Concept demo by Jack Bikar — not an official site.
Concept demo by Jack Bikar - not an official site.

steps.direction: Never hold static. Begin scrolling the moment the page is up and glide down the whole homepage in one unbroken, gentle pass (~750px/s). The hero still reads because the first couple of seconds barely move; there is no separate hero hold.
steps.why: One slow continuous scroll through the entire site — motion from the very first frame

steps.direction: As the scroll settles at the footer, glide the cursor up to the red Book Now button and click — the cursor is the moving element during the page transition.
steps.why: Click the red Book Now button in the header

steps.direction: Ease the booking form into frame and let the cursor drift to rest near it. Keep the framing motion gentle and brief — no long static hold on the form.
steps.why: Booking page loads — fit the booking form with a short, moving settle
